title: Shinji the Klan member
wikitext:
[]: Shinji the Klan member             Quote Post by aranami » Fri Jan 06, 2006 11:34 pm I was watching ep. 26 the other day and when it got to the part in the middle where Shinji's body turns into all those different shapes one of the things he turns into is a cross and then the cross burns away

[]:             Quote Post by Hand of God » Sun Jan 08, 2006 8:45 pm and that means that his a kkk memeber........................... nice imagination there

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Mon Jan 09, 2006 12:12 pm I have to say thats a stretch. I doubt it was ment to be looked that way, and what purpose would it have other then to start a pointless topic like what we have here lol.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Jan 09, 2006 12:16 pm They let little asian kids in the KKK? I'm not even going their.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Mon Jan 09, 2006 12:21 pm Doh! I didnt even think about his yellowness :P

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Mon Jan 09, 2006 12:32 pm Oooooo....k. Funny tho...

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Mon Jan 09, 2006 1:30 pm Fascinating.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Mon Jan 09, 2006 6:50 pm Naww that just means the kkk set him on fire. They probably did it on penpens lawn because what most people dont realize is that penpens black(well partially anyway). But penpen doesnt take that, he got out his metal bat and gave them a beatdown! Unfortunatly Shinji got burnt to a crisp and had to imagine himself in his own mind to get back to normal, but that's another story!

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Jan 09, 2006 7:15 pm Defectron wrote: Naww that just means the kkk set him on fire. They probably did it on penpens lawn because what most people dont realize is that penpens black(well partially anyway). But penpen doesnt take that, he got out his metal bat and gave them a beatdown! Unfortunatly Shinji got burnt to a crisp and had to imagine himself in his own mind to get back to normal, but that's another story!

[]: Re: Shinji the Klan member             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Mon Jan 09, 2006 7:36 pm aranami wrote: I was watching ep. 26 the other day and when it got to the part in the middle where Shinji's body turns into all those different shapes one of the things he turns into is a cross and then the cross burns away

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Mon Jan 09, 2006 10:11 pm When is stuff just stuff? When a fan says it can be, and that's never.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Jan 09, 2006 10:39 pm Hexon.Arq wrote: When is stuff just stuff? When a fan says it can be, and that's never.

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Tue Jan 10, 2006 4:13 am DatDude wrote: Hexon.Arq wrote: When is stuff just stuff? When a fan says it can be, and that's never.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Jan 10, 2006 11:09 am No I just think this is an anime nt a magic eye puzzle.

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Tue Jan 10, 2006 9:07 pm O.O uhm... I really dont think Anno was trying to portray Shinji as KKK member... Because if thats so, the cross burns into the eye of truth, right? So, it'd be sending messages that the KKK is the ultimate truth... which....is incorrect?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Jan 10, 2006 9:12 pm Shnooks wrote: O.O uhm... I really dont think Anno was trying to portray Shinji as KKK member... Because if thats so, the cross burns into the eye of truth, right? So, it'd be sending messages that the KKK is the ultimate truth... which....is incorrect?

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Wed Jan 11, 2006 4:12 am Yay, today is a fun day for me... Because my quote has been proven true so many times! Even jokingly, if you think that Shinji is a KKK member from that scene, then you are reading too much into it.

[]:             Quote Post by aranami » Wed Jan 11, 2006 2:39 pm I just wanted to see how many funny replys i could get

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Thu Jan 12, 2006 5:58 am DatDude wrote: And anno not being fucking white would not endorse an orginization that would string his ass from a tree if he dated a white girl.
